name: rum-fullstack-team
description: Tencent Cloud RUM full-lifecycle expert team: SDK integration across 10 platforms + data analysis with WebVitals/errors/API/resource diagnostics.

displayName.zh: 腾讯云 RUM 全链路专家团

displayDescription.en: 3 roles collaborate across the Tencent Cloud RUM lifecycle: the lead routes requests, Aiden integrates the aegis SDK for 10 platforms (Web / mini-programs / React Native / Node.js / Hippy / Cocos / LiteApp / QuickApp / Viola / Weex) with safety checks and rollback plans, and Nova queries RUM metrics to diagnose WebVitals, JS/Promise errors, API latency and slow resources with RUM-APM correlation.
displayDescription.zh: 3 位专家协作覆盖腾讯云 RUM 完整生命周期：主理人负责路由分派，接入官 Aiden 处理 10 大平台（Web / 小程序 / React Native / Node.js / Hippy / Cocos / LiteApp / QuickApp / Viola / Weex）的 aegis SDK 集成、安全校验与回滚方案，分析师 Nova 查询 RUM 数据并诊断 WebVitals、JS/Promise 异常、接口延迟与慢资源，支持 RUM-APM 链路联动。

defaultInitPrompt.en: Help me integrate Tencent Cloud RUM into my Vue 3 project
defaultInitPrompt.zh: 帮我在这个 Vue 3 项目里接入腾讯云 RUM
